diary_entries.entry: The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Population: 31. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Vulcan-23.
Another year. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 74): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
